Expertise

What Coach Ethiraj
Specialises In

A holistic approach to fitness — combining strength, cardio, nutrition and mindset for lasting transformation.

🏋️

Strength & Body Building

Full gym strength training — guided by a state-level body building champion who knows exactly how to build muscle safely and effectively.

🏆

Power Lifting & Conditioning

University and national-level experience in power lifting — transferred into structured conditioning programmes for all fitness levels.

🩺

Sugar & Cholesterol Management

Specialised low-impact training programmes designed for diabetic and high-cholesterol patients — safe, progressive and medically mindful.

🧘

Posture & Rehabilitation

Physiotherapy-backed training principles to correct posture, recover from injury and build a pain-free foundation.

🥗

Nutrition & Diet Planning

Custom meal and supplement guidance to complement your workout — whether the goal is fat loss, muscle gain or health.

👥

Personalised Coaching

Individual attention for every member — tailored plans, form correction, weekly progress tracking and continuous motivation.

📊

Transformation Tracking

Regular assessments, body composition tracking and milestone reviews to keep you motivated and on target every step of the way.

Titles & Championships

Competitive
Achievements

A decorated competitive career spanning 20+ years — from university podiums to state and national body building championships.

National Level
🏆
1st Place · 02 March 2008

Mr. East Tamilnadu 2008

80kg Weight Class Body Building Championship held at Arignar Anna Stadium, Cuddalore District. Awarded by Tamilnadu Amateure Body Building Association (TABBA) — affiliated to Indian Body Building Federation, recognised by the Sports Development Authority of India and Government of India, Department of Youth Affairs & Sports.

State LevelBody Building80kg Category
🥇
1st Place · 2002–03

Best Physique – 85kg

Inter-Divisional Tournament, Thiruvalluvar University, Vellore — Best Physique in the 85kg category, representing St. Joseph's College, Cuddalore. Merit Certificate issued by the Vice Chancellor and Director of Physical Education.

University LevelPhysique85kg Category
💪
1st Place · 2007–08

Power Lifting – Periyar Arts

Inter-Divisional Power Lifting competition, Thiruvalluvar University — First position representing Periyar Arts College, Cuddalore. Certified by the Director of Physical Education and Vice Chancellor of Thiruvalluvar University, Vellore.

University LevelPower Lifting
🏅
1st Place · 2007–08

Best Physique – 70kg, Vellore

Inter-Divisional Best Physique — 70kg category, First position held at Vellore, Thiruvalluvar University 2007–08. Representing Periyar Arts, Cuddalore. Signed and certified by the Vice Chancellor.

University LevelPhysique70kg Category

1st Place · 2013–14

Power Lifting – 98kg

University LevelPower Lifting98kg Category

1st Place · 2013–14

Best Physique – 87kg

All India · 2013–14

South Zone Inter-University

Represented Thiruvalluvar University in Power Lifting at the All India / South Zone Inter-University Tournament held in Coimbatore — organised by Hindusthan University, 2013–14. Meritorious Sportsman Certificate (Form-III) issued.

National LevelPower LiftingInter-University

2nd Place · 2012–13

TNBBA Body Building – 80–90kg

Senior division, 80–90kg category — 2nd Place at the Open Tamilnadu Body Building Championship 2012–13, held at Kalpickett Palaiyam. Certified by the Tamilnadu Body Builders Association (TNBBA).
